evidence.quote: The cell chambers were composed of wedge-shaped pairs of pillars with 5 µm spacing, whose numbers were determined according to the desired sample sizes of 10–100 cells in iProChip and a single cell in SciProChip. The flow of a cell solution of appropriate density enabled the size-based capturing of mammalian cells within a few seconds, accompanied by real time microscopy monitoring.
